design_philosophy: Credible, no-nonsense, and engineered. The site bridges military PM discipline with real estate portfolio building. Visuals must be authoritative, clean, and results-focused. High contrast between deep navy and off-white creates a premium, high-end consulting feel.

primary.name: Deep Navy
primary.usage: Hero section backgrounds, primary text, prominent headings, solid footer background.

accent.name: Gold / Champagne
accent.usage: Primary CTAs, subtle border highlights, icons, hover states, selection highlights.

background.name: Off-White
background.usage: Global page background (except Hero/Footer), card backgrounds, section dividers.

surface.name: Soft White
surface.usage: Elevated cards on off-white backgrounds, input fields, dropdowns.

border.name: Navy Light
border.usage: Grid borders, card strokes, subtle dividers.

labels.classes: text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold tracking-[0.15em] uppercase text-[#C9A84C]

layout_spacing.bento_strategy: Use asymmetric grid for Services (e.g., Premium Retainer takes 2 columns, others take 1) to create visual tension and hierarchy.
layout_spacing.alignment: Left-align dense text and paragraphs. Headings can be left-aligned or centered based on layout balance (e.g., Center for Hero, Left for About).

header.classes: sticky top-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F5F5F0]/80 border-b border-[#0A1628]/10

buttons.primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0A1628] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#b09240] transition-colors border-2 border-[#C9A84C]
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#0A1628] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none border-2 border-[#0A1628] hover:bg-[#0A1628] hover:text-[#F5F5F0] transition-colors
buttons.dark_mode_primary: bg-[#C9A84C] text-[#0A1628] font-semibold px-8 py-4 rounded-none hover:bg-[#F5F5F0] transition-colors

cards.classes: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#0A1628]/10 rounded-none shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg transition-shadow duration-300 relative group overflow-hidden

forms.inputs: bg-transparent border-b-2 border-[#0A1628]/20 rounded-none px-0 py-3 text-lg focus:border-[#C9A84C] focus:ring-0 transition-colors placeholder-[#0A1628]/40

interactive_motion.scroll: Use Lenis for smooth momentum scrolling.
interactive_motion.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-2px]. Cards get subtle lift and border color shift to Gold. Nav links get an underline expansion.
interactive_motion.entrances: Fade in and slide up (translate-y-4) for sections as they enter viewport.
interactive_motion.accessibility: Respect prefers-reduced-motion. Ensure hover states exceed 4.5:1 contrast.

pages_structure.global: Single Page Application (SPA) with smooth anchor scrolling to sections.
pages_structure.navigation: Home, About, Services, Financial Clarity Tool, Contact

sections.description: Deep Navy background. Strong left-aligned typography. Headline: 'Your Real Estate Portfolio, Built with Military Precision'. Gold primary CTA.
Off-white background. Rafael's story (17 years Army Engineering, real estate since 2013). Use a split layout: portrait image on one side, text on the other.
Bento-style grid. 1. Tools & Templates (low-ticket). 2. Done-For-You Packages (mid-tier). 3. Consulting Retainer (premium). High visual distinction for the Retainer tier.
Dedicated section. Headline: 'Know Your Number'. Focus on the one clean monthly net value. Includes a waitlist form.
Content Hub teaser. Two side-by-side dark cards: 'Everyday Estate Podcast' and 'The Blog'. Minimal, sleek, email capture forms for notifications.
Simple form (Name, Email, 'What are you working on?'). Submits directly via API, saved to MongoDB. No third-party tools.

pages_structure.footer: Deep Navy background. Brief bio blurb, social links, email, and tagline.

admin_dashboard.description: A secure (/admin) route to view contact submissions and waitlist signups stored in MongoDB.
admin_dashboard.style: Utilitarian, high-contrast, data-dense table layout using Shadcn UI table components.

media_assets.instructions: Use with a heavy Deep Navy (bg-[#0A1628]/80) overlay to ensure text readability.
Use in the About section. Apply a subtle grayscale filter with a gold hover effect to match the engineered, precise brand tone.
Use in the Financial Clarity Tool section to visualize data mastery.

icons: Use 'lucide-react' for sharp, clean geometric icons. Set stroke-width to 1.5 for a sophisticated look.

testing_guidelines.data_testids: All interactive elements, forms, links, and buttons MUST have a descriptive 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., 'data-testid="hero-cta-button"', 'data-testid="contact-form-submit"').

instructions_to_main_agent: Install and use Lenis for smooth scrolling.
Implement Shadcn UI for forms, inputs, and tables (especially for the Admin Dashboard).
Build standard sections purely with Tailwind and HTML for custom layouts.
Do NOT use Inter for headings; strictly use Montserrat for headings and Inter for body.
Implement MongoDB connection for the contact form and waitlist.
Ensure the hero image has a sufficient dark overlay to contrast with white/gold text.
